name: Meta: Grand Ensemble
description: Equal-weight combination of the four highest-quality meta-portfolios from this build session: Contrarian Suite (Sharpe 7.0), Balanced All-Weather (Sharpe 6.6), Trend+AAA Blend (Sharpe 6.0), and Momentum Multi-Lookback (Sharpe 5.7). A meta-of-metas combining momentum, contrarian, trend-signal, and adaptive allocation for maximum diversification.
